key_facts: SolisCloud is Ginlong Technologies' (605118.SH) cloud monitoring platform
600K+ inverter installations globally give organic SolisCloud user base
Features: real-time monitoring, smart alarms, remote firmware upgrades, O&M work-orders
Ginlong is world's #3 PV inverter manufacturer by volume
SolisCloud competes with SOLARMAN, Sungrow iSolarCloud as monitoring platform
business_model_notes: OEM-captive monitoring SaaS identical to Sungrow iSolarCloud model. Ginlong sells Solis-branded inverters worldwide; SolisCloud is the free (with paid premium features) monitoring layer. User acquisition = inverter shipments. Revenue: premium monitoring features, remote O&M service contracts. Ginlong's strategy: compete on inverter price + bundle SolisCloud free to retain installer loyalty vs SOLARMAN's multi-brand approach.
competitive_position: Third-tier captive platform (after Sungrow iSolarCloud and Growatt ShinePhone) in OEM-embedded monitoring. Ginlong's #3 global inverter position provides meaningful captive user base (600K+) but smaller than Sungrow's 98 GW managed. SolisCloud is particularly strong in European residential market where Ginlong Solis inverters have strong installer adoption.
research_notes: High confidence. Ginlong financial data from 605118.SH semi-annual report H1 2021. SolisCloud platform features from company documentation. 600K+ installs from Tracxn database. Note: Ginlong's rapid revenue growth (99.8% in H1 2021) coincides with China's 整县推进 residential solar boom.
